policy.official_facts: Only claims directly supported by current Amazon Ads public documentation.
policy.account_observation: Metrics and messages from an authorized advertiser account, scoped to that profile, marketplace, product, report, and date range.
policy.inference: A reproducible interpretation of account evidence; never relabeled as an official Amazon algorithm rule.
policy.dynamic_fields: Report type IDs, columns, lookback windows, eligibility, and marketplace availability must be checked against the live console or developer portal before automation.

products.boundary: Availability, columns, lookback, and attribution settings can vary by account, marketplace, and interface version.
Do not reuse Sponsored Products sales scope, placement groups, or attribution assumptions.
Audience, view-through, click-through, and attribution semantics require the product-specific live definition.
Amazon Attribution is not the same attribution contract as Sponsored Ads reporting.

report_evidence: API reports after application and approval
products.boundary: Authentication, profiles, report schemas, versions, and availability must be validated in the current developer portal.
